ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meteorites" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorite */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorite */,
  "id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "nametype" TEXT /* Type of name (e.g., Valid) */,
  "recclass" TEXT /* Classification of the meteorite (e.g., Eucrite, Pallasite) */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the meteorite in grams */,
  "fall" TEXT /* Fall type (e.g., Found) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the meteorite was found */,
  "reclat" REAL /* Latitude of the meteorite's location */,
  "reclong" REAL /* Longitude of the meteorite's location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical location of the meteorite */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the meteorite */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the meteorite */,
  "discovery_method" TEXT /* Method used to discover the meteorite */,
  "research_status" TEXT /* Current research status */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the meteorite */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the meteorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_geolocation FOREIGN KEY ("geolocation") REFERENCES geographical_locations ("geolocation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_fall FOREIGN KEY ("fall") REFERENCES meteorite_falls ("fall_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_recclass FOREIGN KEY ("recclass") REFERENCES meteorite_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES meteorite_years ("year_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorite type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorite type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meteorite type */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Typical composition of the meteorite type */,
  "commonality" TEXT /* Commonality or rarity of the meteorite type */,
  "formation_process" TEXT /* Formation process of the meteorite type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_falls" (
  "fall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fall type */,
  "fall_name" TEXT /* Name of the fall type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fall type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of this fall type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year when the meteorite was found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the meteorite was found */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact zone */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the impact zone */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the impact zone */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date of the impact */,
  "impact_energy" REAL /* Energy released during the impact */,
  "impact_crater" TEXT /* Name or description of the impact crater */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the impact zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_zones_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographical_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division within the institution */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the meteorite */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the meteorite was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the team's project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the team's project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the team's project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
